headline: Jefferies Maintains Buy on Interactive Brokers Group, Lowers Price Target to $81
summary: Jefferies  analyst Daniel Fannon   maintains Interactive Brokers Group (NASDAQ:IBKR) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $91 to $81.

raw.headline: Jefferies Maintains Buy on Interactive Brokers Group, Lowers Price Target to $81
raw.summary: Jefferies  analyst Daniel Fannon   maintains Interactive Brokers Group (NASDAQ:IBKR) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $91 to $81.

headline: Interactive Brokers' March Total Client DARTs Increase Y/Y
summary: IBKR's March DARTs rose 25% y/y to 4.329M as accounts hit 4.75M. Options and futures grew, but client equity fell 4% m/m.

raw.headline: Interactive Brokers' March Total Client DARTs Increase Y/Y
